title: Orientation Week 2018: What’s Happening
description: Welcome, Class of 2022! Our student ambassadors have an amazing schedule planned for you. Here’s a sneak peek into some of the fun.
text:
Orientation Week 2018: What’s Happening
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
Welcome, Class of 2022! Our student ambassadors have an amazing schedule planned for you. Here’s a sneak peek into some of the fun.
Catch a show on campus by Shanghai comedy club Kung Fu Komedy, and don’t miss our very own NYU Shanghai’s Got Talent show. You can put your teamwork to the test in a timed escape room or get (a little) competitive with bowling and laser tag.
There will be plenty of opportunities to go out and explore Shanghai, from joining a walking tour of famous neighborhoods in Shanghai, to racing around the city solving clues in the Amazing Race scavenger hunt.
You can also take part in community service, a great way to meet local residents and help make a difference in their lives. We will be making moon cakes on Saturday with students of the Sunshine Home, which cares for disabled children, as well as helping out at the Baoshan and Minhang animal shelters.
Read more:

text_blocks.text: Welcome, Class of 2022! Our student ambassadors have an amazing schedule planned for you. Here’s a sneak peek into some of the fun.

Catch a show on campus by Shanghai comedy club Kung Fu Komedy, and don’t miss our very own NYU Shanghai’s Got Talent show. You can put your teamwork to the test in a timed escape room or get (a little) competitive with bowling and laser tag.

There will be plenty of opportunities to go out and explore Shanghai, from joining a walking tour of famous neighborhoods in Shanghai, to racing around the city solving clues in the Amazing Race scavenger hunt.

You can also take part in community service, a great way to meet local residents and help make a difference in their lives. We will be making moon cakes on Saturday with students of the Sunshine Home, which cares for disabled children, as well as helping out at the Baoshan and Minhang animal shelters.
